creator: yanefbsd@gmail.com
text:
On Nov 15, 2008, at 2:00 PM, Thomas Schlesinger wrote:

> The following reply was made to PR misc/128895; it has been noted by  
> GNATS.
>
> From: Thomas Schlesinger <schlesinger@netcologne.de>
> To: bug-followup@freebsd.org,
> schlesix@gmx.de
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: misc/128895: devel/subversion (1.5.4_2) doesn't build
> Date: Sat, 15 Nov 2008 22:50:53 +0100
>
> Problem solved. I've built it with -j 3. I've tried without that, an  
> the
> problem has gone.

Low priority race condition, potentially upstream?
-Garrett
